description_long: This kiosk is a rectangular, open-fronted structure divided into two main sections, each with distinct interior themes and colorful wall graphics. The left section features a counter area with illustrated food items and a playful, educational design, while the right section has a green-themed interior with a large illustrated game or activity mat on the floor and animal graphics on the walls. The exterior walls are mostly white with green accents and display printed signage reading 'SEGALMEX LICONSA' along the upper panels. The roof is flat and open, with no visible overhangs or awnings, and the side and rear walls are solid with minimal decoration except for a small black graphic on the back. There are no visible windows, but the open front allows for easy access and interaction, making it suitable for public engagement or educational activities in urban environments.
description: A rectangular, open-fronted kiosk with two themed sections, colorful interior graphics, and prominent printed signage on white and green exterior walls. The flat roof and open entry make it inviting for public interaction.
description_view_0: The front view shows the open entry to both sections, revealing colorful interior graphics, counters, and activity areas, with printed signage above.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the solid white exterior wall and a glimpse of the interior's colorful back panels.
description_view_2: The rear view shows a plain white wall with a small black graphic and no visible entry or windows.
description_view_3: The right side view reveals more interior graphics and the solid white exterior, similar to the left side.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign with 'SEGALMEX LICONSA' text, placed above the entrance on both sections and integrated into the upper front panels.
attribute_door_configuration: Open entryway spanning the entire front; no doors visible.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof, no overhangs or decorative elements, appears to be made of the same material as the walls.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern minimalist with educational and playful graphic elements.
